description: A new procurement manager has been hired at 'Gemini Furniture' and is now the primary point of contact for an existing deal. In Odoo CRM, create a new individual contact for Patricia Williams (Procurement Manager, p.williams@geminifurniture.example.com, +1 555-0192) as a contact person under the 'Gemini Furniture' company. Update the 'Office Furniture Bulk Order' CRM opportunity by changing the customer from 'Gemini Furniture' to Patricia Williams.
